infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Allow Safedrive to access your device motion to detect driving events like harsh acceleration, braking, and steering.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Safedrive to access your location to track your speed and map your driving route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow Safedrive to track your driving route and analyze safety in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow Safedrive to track your driving route and analyze safety in the background.

plugins.motionPermission: Allow Safedrive to access your device motion to detect driving events like harsh acceleration, braking, and steering.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Safedrive to access your location to track your speed and map your driving route.
